nonBlockingIssues.description: Unused imports in generate_comparison_fixture.py: EvaluationRunner (line 40) and extract_params (line 41) are imported but never used.

Dead code in heatmap-tab.js: ternary `zmin: hasNulls ? undefined : undefined` always evaluates to undefined (line 149); buildDarkColorscale() called with hasNulls arg but function accepts no params (line 131 vs 396); unused nullMask variable in render1DLineChart (line 262).
Pass threshold line in walkforward-tab.js uses global mean of train values rather than per-window delta_pct boundary. Reasonable visualization approximation but slightly imprecise.
Template literal HTML in walkforward-tab.js inserts data values (regime_tags, period strings) directly into innerHTML without escaping. Low risk since data comes from pre-generated JSON fixtures.
Dead code in divergence.js: `hour < 0` check in getSessionFromTime() is unreachable since parseInt of a 2-digit string is never negative.
Performance: all divergence entries (~10k) rendered into DOM at once via innerHTML concatenation. Acceptable given vanilla JS constraints, but could cause render latency with very large datasets.
Minor event listener leak in ground-truth.js: outside-click handler added via setTimeout(50ms) may not be cleaned up if popover is closed before timeout fires. Unlikely to accumulate in practice.
Misleading guard in ground-truth.js rebuildGTRings(): checks _candleTimesArr && _candleTimeSet but never uses them directly — uses app.candlesByDay[app.day] instead.

appliedUpdates.description: Added root cause documentation for displacement atr_multiplier/body_ratio having no sweep variation: hardcoded DISP_ATR_MULTS emission gate uses loosest-OR gate (atr >= 1.0 OR body >= 0.55).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the 'Allowed' file list to include 'site/generate_*.py' or 'site/generate_*' to cover both shell and Python fixture generators. Currently only lists site/generate_eval_data.sh explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: multi-config-fixture created site/generate_comparison_fixture.py which is not in the allowlist. This is a reasonable fixture generator in site/.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the cross-file variable sharing convention: top-level `let` declarations in JS files are implicitly global in the script-tag architecture. Document which variables are considered public API across files (e.g., _allMarkers from chart-tab.js consumed by ground-truth.js) and establish a naming convention for cross-file vs file-private variables.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ground-truth.js:197 reads _allMarkers from chart-tab.js:11; ground-truth.js:210 reads _candleTimesArr/_candleTimeSet from chart-tab.js:12-13. All are top-level `let` declarations. No documentation of this pattern exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the initialization guard pattern: init functions should check a _xxxInitialized flag to prevent double-initialization. Multiple features now use this pattern (initChartTab, initGroundTruth, initLockPanel, initDivergencePanel). Make it a required convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ground-truth.js:678 (_gtInitialized), ground-truth.js:724 (_lockInitialized), chart-tab.js initChartTab, divergence.js initDivergencePanel all use this pattern independently.

rejectedObservations.observation: features.json fulfills array includes VAL-DIV-009 which doesn't exist in validation contract
rejectedObservations.reason: Orchestrator metadata issue. VAL-DIV-009 (filter by session) does exist in the validation-contract.md. The validation contract defines DIV assertions through VAL-DIV-009. This is not actually an error.
